INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello, World!'), ('Goodbye, World!'), ('ClickHouse is great!');
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, 'o', 'OO') AS replaced_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, '[aeiou]', '*') AS replaced_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, '([!?])', '...') AS replaced_string FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_replacements (pattern String, replacement String);

SELECT original_string, replaceRegexpAll(original_string, (SELECT pattern FROM test_replacements WHERE pattern = '.'), (SELECT replacement FROM test_replacements WHERE pattern = '.')) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, 'World', (SELECT replacement FROM test_replacements WHERE pattern = '^')) AS replaced_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll((SELECT original_string FROM test_strings LIMIT 1), '\s+', '_') AS replaced_string;
SELECT original_string, replaceRegexpAll(original_string, 'ClickHouse|great', 'awesome') AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, '(.+)', '#$1#') AS decorated_string FROM test_strings WHERE original_string LIKE 'Goodbye%';
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, '\d+', 'number') AS replaced_string FROM (SELECT 'Hello 123' AS original_string) AS subquery;
SELECT replaceRegexpAll(original_string, '^(.+?)\s', 'prefix: $1 ') AS prefixed_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO more_strings VALUES ('Testing replacement.'), ('Final message: Goodbye!');
SELECT text, replaceRegexpAll(text, '[A-Z]', '@') AS replaced_text FROM more_strings;
